mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOAN_APPLICATION (APPLICATION_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, AMOUNT, STATUS_CODE, FILE_NAME) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{customerId}, #{amount}, #{statusCode}, #{fileName})
mapper.select: SELECT APPLICATION_ID AS applicationId, CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, AMOUNT AS amount, STATUS_CODE AS statusCode, FILE_NAME AS fileName FROM LOAN_APPLICATION ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID DESC
SELECT APPLICATION_ID AS applicationId, CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, AMOUNT AS amount, STATUS_CODE AS statusCode, FILE_NAME AS fileName FROM LOAN_APPLICATION WHERE APPLICATION_ID = #{id}

SELECT APPLICATION_ID AS applicationId, CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, AMOUNT AS amount, STATUS_CODE AS statusCode, FILE_NAME AS fileName FROM LOAN_APPLICATION
CUSTOMER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND STATUS_CODE = #{status}
ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID DESC

SELECT APPLICATION_ID AS applicationId, CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, AMOUNT AS amount, STATUS_CODE AS statusCode, FILE_NAME AS fileName FROM LOAN_APPLICATION ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
